LanguageData.PS_ChemfuelTank.description: An industrial liquid storage tank meant for storing chemfuel delivered via chemfuel pipe network. Tanks can be designated to be siphoned for usable chemfuel as needed. If damaged even lightly the escaping fumes will very swiftly create a gaseous fireball, the size of the resulting explosion will depend on the amount stored within.
LanguageData.PS_ChemfuelTank.label: chemfuel tank
LanguageData.VCHE_ChemfuelDrain.description: A hopper-like storage basin meant to input chemfuel into the network, filling up connected tanks.
LanguageData.VCHE_ChemfuelDrain.label: chemfuel drain
LanguageData.VCHE_ChemfuelPipe.description: Steel pipes designed to transport usable chemfuel from deepchem refineries to chemfuel tanks for storage or to chemfuel-consuming structures for automatic refilling.
LanguageData.VCHE_ChemfuelPipe.label: chemfuel pipe
LanguageData.VCHE_ChemfuelTap.description: A hopper-like storage basin meant to hold dispensed chemfuel from tanks periodically for use later.
LanguageData.VCHE_ChemfuelTap.label: chemfuel tap
LanguageData.VCHE_ChemfuelValve.label: chemfuel valve
LanguageData.VCHE_UndergroundChemfuelPipe.description: Subterranean steel pipes designed to transport usable chemfuel from deepchem refineries to chemfuel tanks for storage or to chemfuel-consuming structures for automatic refilling.
LanguageData.VCHE_UndergroundChemfuelPipe.label: subterranean chemfuel pipe
